docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $193.27 FILED BY KNOTT EDWARD JR AS TO DEFENDANT BYNUM ALVIN IND/DBA BAYVIEW MORTUARY CORP LEVERETT J IND/DBA BAYVIEW MORTUARY CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNOTT EDWARD JR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BYNUM ALVIN IND/DBA BAYVIEW MORTUARY CORP LEVERETT J IND/DBA BAYVIEW MORTUARY CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
